title: Auto-regenerate and validate source project bundle stage artifacts before export/import
notes: Suggestion #1 from admin export (submitted by mannyrayner on 2026-05-06), updated by follow-up human guidance on 2026-05-06. Source project bundle export can produce unusable zipfiles when the latest run folder only contains compile_html stage artifacts, for example after rerunning linguistic annotation with both start and end stage set to compile_html. The desired behavior is more ambitious than validation alone: export should detect missing required stage files and, when earlier annotation artifacts are available, automatically regenerate a complete current-run stage set by rerunning the pipeline from audio through compile_html before creating the source bundle. If upstream artifacts needed for this automatic refresh have never been produced or cannot be read, export should fail with an informative error explaining which stages are missing and what the user should rerun. Import of source project zipfiles should also validate required stages and fail early with a clear diagnostic when stage files are missing.
